title: senecio schultzii var. lanatus
intro: Senecio schultzii var. lanatus is a variety of the Senecio schultzii plant, a species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae, native to the mountainous regions of South Africa. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a bronchodilator and expectorant, helping to relieve respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis. The health benefits of Senecio schultzii var. lanatus include reducing inflammation and promoting relaxation, making it a popular remedy for anxiety and stress. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
